name: American Jewelry & Loan
description_short: Detroit-based pawn shop operating since 1978 with 4 Michigan locations. Offers collateral-based loans on jewelry, electronics, tools, and more.
description_long:
American Jewelry and Loan was established in 1978 and has grown into one of the largest and most recognizable pawn shops in the world. The company operates four locations across Michigan: Detroit (flagship), Hazel Park, Pontiac, and Southgate. The Detroit flagship location gained significant national visibility as the setting for the reality television show "Hardcore Pawn," which featured the business and its owners Les and Seth Gold. Despite the media attention, the company remains a dedicated full-service pawn shop.

The company offers three primary services: pawn loans (collateral-based loans on jewelry, electronics, tools, and other items), retail purchases (buying inventory including GIA Certified diamonds, luxury handbags, fine jewelry, timepieces, electronics, and equipment), and selling services (allowing customers to sell valuables for fair market value). All services are available at their four Michigan locations during business hours (Monday-Saturday, 9:30am-6:00pm, closed Sundays).

American Jewelry and Loan distinguishes itself through its 45+ year operating history, multi-location presence across Michigan, and notable brand recognition from the "Hardcore Pawn" television series. The company actively engages in community presence through social media (Facebook, Twitter, Instagram) and maintains a newsletter signup for customer engagement. They accept appointments for services and provide multilingual website support (Arabic, Chinese, English, French, German, Hebrew, Italian, Polish, Portuguese, Russian, Spanish, Ukrainian).

As a pawn shop, American Jewelry and Loan serves customers seeking quick collateral-based loans without credit checks. The primary caveat is that pawn loans typically carry higher interest rates than traditional personal loans, and customers risk losing their pawned items if loans are not repaid. Customers should understand the terms and redemption periods before pledging valuable items.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Established 45+ year history (since 1978) provides stability and market reputation
Multiple locations across Michigan (Detroit, Hazel Park, Pontiac, Southgate) for accessibility
No credit check required for pawn loans, making service accessible to credit-challenged consumers
Accepts diverse collateral including jewelry, electronics, tools, and equipment
GIA Certified diamonds and luxury goods available for purchase at discounted prices
Same-day service available without lengthy application processes
Professional appraisal of valuables for fair market value in buying/selling transactions
cons: Pawn loans typically carry significantly higher interest rates than traditional personal loans
Risk of losing pledged items if loan is not repaid within redemption period
Limited to 4 Michigan locations; not available nationwide or online
Pawn loans are short-term solutions and do not build credit history
Website provides minimal information about specific loan terms, rates, or redemption periods
best_for: Consumers needing quick cash who own valuable items (jewelry, electronics, tools)
Individuals with poor or no credit history unable to qualify for traditional loans
Those seeking to purchase luxury goods or jewelry at below-retail prices
Customers in Michigan willing to accept higher rates for immediate, no-credit-check financing
diagnosis: American Jewelry and Loan is best for Michigan residents who need immediate cash and own valuable items to pledge as collateral, particularly those with credit challenges who cannot access traditional loans. The main caveat is that pawn loans carry high interest rates and short redemption periods, making them suitable only for short-term financial needs rather than sustainable credit solutions.
services: Collateral-based pawn loans on tools and equipment
Purchase of luxury handbags and accessories
Purchase of fine jewelry and timepieces
Retail purchase of electronics and equipment
Selling valuables for fair market value assessment
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
